speaker: Seeker

strategy_intent: Used Lens C to mirror her sacrifice of career progression to protect her family's relationships and honor.

strategy_intent: Used Lens E to mirror the implied fear of being judged as an inadequate daughter-in-law if she focuses on work.

strategy_intent: Provided a systemic reframe on how creating structural boundaries, even small ones, protects personal identity without forcing a direct confrontation.

text: Apne maa-baap ko logon ke taano se bachane aur rishta banaye rakhne ki khatir, aap lagatar apne sapnon aur zarooraton ko bilkul peeche chhod rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar maine palat ke jawab diya toh ghar toot jayega. WFH me office ki deadlines poori karne ke baad mujhe jaldi jaldi sabke liye khana banana padta hai. Meri zindagi sirf ek duty ban kar reh gayi hai aur iska mujhe bahut darr lagta hai ki main kab tak chal paungi aise.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the immense pressure of performing dual roles perfectly.
text: Ek taraf office ke targets poore karna aur dusri taraf ek aadarsh bahu bankar ghar ka saara kaam akele uthana, in dono farz ke beech aap bohot bhari dabaav mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sasural mein apni awaaz daba leti hoon
text: Bilkul. Meri salary har mahine ghar ke account me chali jati hai, phir bhi meri izzat us roti gol banane se hi judi hai. Main chidchidi ho rahi hoon, par badnaami se dar lagta hai, bas isiliye main sasural mein apni awaaz daba leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the feared consequence that stops her from expressing her frustration.
text: Samaj ke darr aur parivaar ke tootne ki ghabrahat aapko is hadd tak rok leti hai ki aap apne haq aur samman ke liye ek shabd bhi nahi nikal paati hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bolungi toh kya hoga? Saas hamesha bolti hain ki 'aurat agar kamane lage toh uske par nikal aate hain'. Main rone lagti hoon akele me. Mujhe lagta hai shayad mere andar hi problem hai, shayad main hi weak pad gayi hoon in taano ke aage.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a soft restatement ending in a pause to hold space for the stigma around feeling weak.
text: Lagatar ye sab sunte sunte ab aapko apne upar hi shaq hone laga hai ki shayad aap hi kamzor pad rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki mera husband bhi meri side nahi leta. Wo kehta hai ki 'auratein toh chula-chauka karti hi hain, sab karte hain isme kya complain karna'. Waha se koi umeed hi nahi bachi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the long duration of feeling unsupported by her husband.
text: Rozana bina kisi support ke aur apne life partner se bhi samajh na milne par, aap ye poora bojh lambe waqt se bina kisi ki madad ke hi utha rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sasural mein apni awaaz daba leti hoon
text: Akele hi utha rahi hoon aur lagta hai chapti ja rahi hoon iske neeche. Kabhi kabhi toh official call pe rote rote mute button dabati hoon. Koi nahi poochta main kaisi hoon, bas ladai avoid karne ke liye main sasural mein apni awaaz daba leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the exact unexpressed emotion (ISOLATION) triggered by Gender Role conflict and Relational Preservation.
text: Lagta hai ki sabko sametne aur is rishte mein shanti banaye rakhne ki koshish mein aap bilkul ISOLATION mehsoos kar rahi hain, jaise kisi ko aapki asli takleef aur rona dikhayi hi nahi de raha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi pakda aapne. Akelapan itna hai ki bata nahi sakti. Office ke log sochte hain main sorted independent ladki hoon jo kama rahi hai. Gharwale sochte hain main unke ishaaron pe chalne wali machine hoon. Asliyat mein main dono ke beech pis rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the Seeker's isolation as culturally normal for working women dealing with strict family roles.
text: Tumhara is tarah phas kar bilkul akela mehsoos karna ekdam swabhavik hai. Hamare samaj mein working women se aksar yahi ummeed ki jati hai ki wo bahar ka bhi poora sambhalein aur ghar ki izzat aur rasoi bhi, aur is chakkar mein thakne mein tumhari koi niji galti nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak chuki hoon, par main ruk bhi nahi sakti na. Mere maa-baap ne apna pet kaat kar mujhe padhaya taaki main apne pairon pe khadi ho sakun. Agar unhe pata chala ki mere in-laws meri degree aur career ki value nahi karte, toh unka dil toot jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a brief systemic anecdote to normalize the Seeker's experience without offering solutions.
text: Working women ki zindagi mein apne career aur sasural ki expectations ke beech is tarah ka dabav bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul kar is baare mein bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein badnaami aur divorce ka darr sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baatein sun ke kam se kam lagta hai ki main akeli pagal nahi hoon jo aisi ghutan seh rahi hai. Har kisi ne ek parda daal rakha hai apni zindagiyon par. Main bhi wahi parda apni aur maa baap ki izzat ke liye sambhal rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting on how she bears the sole responsibility of keeping up the facade of a perfect life.
text: Dusron ke dikhawe aur is parde ko girne se bachane ki saari bhaari zimmedari aapne bina aawaz kiye apne kandhon par oadh li hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sasural mein apni awaaz daba leti hoon
text: Ji. Par sach kahun toh ab aur sahan nahi hota. WFH meeting ke beech chai banana, sab kuch perfect dikhana. Main bas kalesh avoid karne ke liye sasural mein apni awaaz daba leti hoon par mujhe is ghutan se theek hona hai. Batao kya karoon main? Aage ka rasta band dikhta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing 2 low-stakes options to create personal space amidst her duties.
text: Aapki is ghutan bhari routine mein thodi saans lene ki jagah banane ke liye hum do chhote kadam try kar sakte hain. Pehla, apne office calendar mein roz 10 minute ka 'Busy' block laga kar chupchap baithna bina kisi kaam ke. Dusra, raat ko sone se pehle apne laptop notepad mein ek line likhna jo aaj aapne sirf khud ke liye mehsus ki ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Notepad wali aadat toh theek hai par main poora din ghar me chula chauka aur office hi karti hoon toh apne liye kya hi likhungi. Wo WFH calendar block wala idea thoda practical lag raha hai. Us time kam se kam koi mujhe laptop ke peechhe disturb nahi karega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the chosen calendar blocking option into an actionable first step.
text: Pehle us calendar block wale kadam ko apni aadat mein laate hain. Kal apne office system par din mein kisi bhi waqt ek 10 minute ka 'Focus Time' ya 'Busy' slot book kar lijiye, phir us time par screen se hat kar bas aaraam se saans lijiye... bas itna hi aaj ke liye try karte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, chae peene ke bahane camera off karke 10 minute main balcony mein khadi ho sakti hoon. Itna sa waqt main bina kisi ko naraz kiye nikal hi lungi aur koi sawal bhi nahi uthayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the safety she finds in avoiding confrontation while securing a moment for herself.
text: Kisi naye taane ya kalesh ka darr na hone ki wajah se, yeh chhota sa 10 minute ka break aapko bina dare apni marzi se chune hue waqt ka ahesaas de payega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Waise mere dil mein gussa bohot aata hai in sab par kabhi kabhi. Main apni salary de kar, kaam kar ke bhi compromise kar rahi hoon. Lekin phir wahi baat, theek hai, society mein auraton ka toh yahi farz hota hai na compromises karna warna unka ghar nahi basta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the societal expectation of women sacrificing as a systemic pressure rather than an absolute truth she must blindly accept.
text: Hamari society mein auraton ke 'farz' ka dhancha is tarah hi banaya gaya hai jahan saari sacrifices aur ghar bachane ka bojh unhi par daal diya jata hai, yeh koi niyam nahi hai jo shuru se sach ho, yeh sirf ek parampara ka dabaav hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Matlab main sach mein itni buri ya selfish nahi hoon jitna mujhe yahan feel karwaya jata hai. Lagatar taane sun sun kar mera khud par se bharosa bilkul hi uth gaya tha aur lagta tha mere sapne hi galat hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting on how the constant blame eroded her self-confidence.
text: Is musalsal dabaav aur dosh diye jane ki wajah se, aapne apni achhaiyon aur as employee apni kaabiliyat ko lekar hi poora aitbaar khona shuru kar diya tha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sasural mein apni awaaz daba leti hoon
text: Haan ji. Har time dimag mein maa-baap rehte the ki divorce stigma se bachna hai isiliye sasural mein apni awaaz daba leti hoon poori tarah. Par shayad apne aap ko zinda rakhne ke liye ab yeh 10 minute nikalna zaroori ho gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her care for her parents and reinforcing her inner strength.
text: Apne maa-baap ki itni fikar karna aur in mushkilon me bhi unhe bacha kar rakhna aapke aandar ki gehri zimmedari dikhata hai, aur badnaami ke darr wale mahaul mein hote hue bhi apne liye jagah dhoondhna such mein aapki majbooti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you so much. Mujhe kisi aisi hi tasalli ki zaroorat thi jo is ghutan mein mera point of view bhi samjhe. Abhi bhi lamba rasta hai aage par ek chota sa starting point toh dhoondh hi liya maine.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relief of finding a small opening after enduring long-term suppression.
text: Itne lambe thaka dene wale safar ke baad, aakhirkaar aapko ek chhoti si kiran aur apne liye theherne ka ek thos rasta mil hi gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji bilkul. Aaj bhi sham ko meeting hai aur side by side raat ki sabji bhi katni hai kitchen mein khade hoke. Par pehle jaisi ghabrahat utni haavi nahi ho rahi. Meeting se pehle apna 10 min wala time off jarur lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a second systemic reframe to reinforce how small acts of claiming space challenge large cultural pressures.
text: Jab bhi aap us bhari expectations wale mahaul se hatkar apni saans poori lene ka tay karti hain, toh darasal aap un strict niyam ko tod rahi hoti hain jo auraton ko lagatar sirf doosron ki khushi ke liye jeena sikhate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi sikhaya gaya hai bachpan se par main insaan hoon, koi nirjeev deewar toh nahi. Chahe 10 minute ka hi time mile, wahan par mera hak hoga, baki sab duties apni jagah hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting on her reclaiming her humanity and separating herself from just being a machine that serves others.
text: Ek machine ya nirjeev cheez ki tarah sabki zaruraton mein ghulne ke bajaye, ab aapne sach mein apne andar ke insaan aur uski keemat ko apni jagah dena shuru kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan ji. Abhi bhi dil ke ek kone me thoda dar baaki rehta hai ki aage kya hoga meri in-laws wali zindagi ka. Chula chauka nahi khatam hoga par main aage se helpless banke nahi rahungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting how the fear of the future has lost its paralyzing grip on her.
text: Bhavishya ka darr bhale hi poori tarah khatam nahi hua ho, par ab usne aapko bebasi mein baandh kar aage badhne se rokna chhod diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai, completely rok nahi payega ab. Main un rules ko seedhe challenge na karun, par apne waale space me to main kam se kam bebas aur chup nahi rahungi abse.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing by affirming her quiet resistance and survival.
text: Is poori mushkil ghadi mein jis tarah apne liye aapne yeh chhota sa lekin zaroori azaadi ka rasta nikala hai, yeh sach mein aapki khamosh himmat aur apne sapnon ko bachane ki ek bohot sarthak pehal hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni suppressed ambition ko smile ke peeche chhupa kar sabki seva karti rehti hoon
text: Doctor ne phir symptoms dismiss kar diye, par ye ghutan career vs sanskar ki ladaai ki wajah se hai. Main promotion ke liye travel nahi karti kyunki khandaan ki bahu ka bahar rehna 'log kya kahenge' wale darr ko badha deta hai. Parvarish par sawal na uthein, isliye main apni suppressed ambition ko smile ke peeche chhupa kar sabki seva karti rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her perceived relational cost of professional success.
text: Aapko lagta hai ki aapke career ko aage badhane se seedha aapke parivaar ki izzat aur rishton par baat aa jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, office wale puchte hain ki main itne saal se ek hi role mein kyun hoon. Unhe kya bataun ki agar main out-station gayi toh saas-sasur kya sochenge. Mera husband bhi kehta hai ki peace maintain karna hi better hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her feared consequence of family disruption if she pursues her goals.
text: Ghar ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye aapne apne promotion aur aage badhne ke raste khud hi rok diye hain, is darr se ki kahin ghar ka mahaul na bigad jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Har din meeting mein apne se junior ko aage badhte dekhti hoon toh andar se jaan nikalti hai. Par phir shaam ko aakar sabke liye khana banati hoon aur dikhati hoon ki main is routine mein bahut khush hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an open question to explore the emotional weight of her daily masking.
text: Jab aap roz apne se chhoton ko aage badhte dekhti hain aur phir ghar aakar sab normal hone ka natak karti hain, toh us waqt man mein kya chal raha hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa lagta hai ki meri koi apni zindagi bachi hi nahi hai. Bas ek machine ban gayi hoon jo office ka routine kaam aur ghar ke sanskar poore kar rahi hai. Ek ajeeb sa akelapan kha raha hai mujhe andar hi andar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the deep isolation that stems from navigating work and family identities alone.
text: Ek taraf office ka pressure aur dusri taraf 'khandaan ki bahu' ka farz nibhate-nibhate, lagta hai aap bahut gehri ISOLATION aur akelepan mein ghir gayi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi pakda aapne. Akeli hi hoon. Par kabhi kabhi main sochti hoon ki kya main sach mein ek buri aurat hoon jo apne parivaar se pehle apne career ke baare mein soch rahi hai? Kya ambition hona kisi aurat ke liye paap hai?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Honoring the long duration of her internal struggle with a gentle pause.
text: Pichle kuch samay se aap khud ke andar is baat ko lekar kashmakash jhel rahi hain aur apne aap ko hi galat maan rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni suppressed ambition ko smile ke peeche chhupa kar sabki seva karti rehti hoon
text: Haan... kai saalon se yehi chal raha hai. Kisi ko bata nahi sakti, bas ghut rahi hoon. Sach kahun toh, bas apni suppressed ambition ko smile ke peeche chhupa kar sabki seva karti rehti hoon, par ab ye dikhawa bardaasht nahi hota.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her natural ambition within the cultural pressures of being a working woman.
text: Humare samaj mein aksar working auraton par yeh dabaav hota hai ki unhein perfect bahu aur maa bhi banna hai. Aapki aage badhne ki chahat bilkul natural hai, aur yeh kisi bhi tarah se aapko kamzor ya buri nahi banati.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you, thoda sukoon mila ye sun kar ki main ajeeb nahi hoon. Lekin real life mein ye balance banana kitna mushkil hai. Main janti hoon mera potential kya hai, par usko daba kar jeena roz ki ek lambi saza ban gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing her identity conflict with a common systemic pattern for working women.
text: Working auraton mein apni pehchan aur ghar ki shanti ke beech yeh kashmakash bahut common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka struggle nahi hai, lekin koi bahar khul kar bolega nahi kyunki society mein sanskari aurat ki image ko sabse zyada maintain karna padta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly! Society ko lagta hai meri life perfect hai double income aur set family ke sath. Par andar se main khokhli ho rahi hoon. Ab mujhe samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, koi raasta hai kya is life-long ghutan se nikalne ka bina ghar tode?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering two small, bounded steps to explore professional growth without triggering immediate family conflict.
text: Dono zimmeydariyon ke beech rasta nikalna aasan nahi hai, par bina takraav ke do chhote kadam try kar sakte hain. Kya aap roz sirf 15 minute apne field ke naye skill courses padhne mein laga sakti hain? Ya phir bina travel wali koi nayi in-house team project ke baare mein manager se discuss kar sakti hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Manager se in-house project ki baat karna theek lag raha hai. Usme travel bhi nahi hoga aur shayad saas-sasur ko bhi objection na ho. Par direct approach karungi toh baat ajeeb lagegi. Shuru kaise karun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the suggestion into an immediate, low-risk execution step.
text: Pehle apne manager ke sath ek casual 1-on-1 meeting schedule karo… phir unhe batao ki aap internal growth opportunities dekh rahi hain jisme travel ki zaroorat kam se kam ho… bas itna hi aaj ke liye discuss karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ye kar sakti hoon. Isme main openly promotion ya travel ko reject karne ki baat bhi nahi karungi, aur dheere dheere meri professional growth bhi restart ho jayegi bina kisi red flag ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing small strategic adjustments as a way to create space without systemic disruption.
text: Jab hum system ke andar aise chhote aur strategic raste dhundhte hain, toh bina kisi direct takraav ke parivaar aur career dono mein apni pehchan ko maintain karna thoda aasan hone lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni suppressed ambition ko smile ke peeche chhupa kar sabki seva karti rehti hoon
text: Ek baat sach kahun? Jab main in-house project ki soch rahi hoon, toh bhi andar se ajeeb sa darr lag raha hai ki main kuch galat kar rahi hoon. Apni suppressed ambition ko smile ke peeche chhupa kar sabki seva karti rehti hoon, is aadat ne mera basic self-confidence hi hila diya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring how her continuous duty fulfillment has eroded her professional confidence.
text: Darr lagna swabhavik hai, kyunki lagataar farz nibhate hue dusron ke hisaab se jeene se insaan ko apni hi asli kabiliyat aur pehchan par shaq hone lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi na. Main pehle aisi timid bilkul nahi thi. Ek time tha jab team presentations mein main hamesha front foot par lead leti thi. Aaj lagta hai mere apne hi ghar mein kisi ne mere professional pankh kaat diye hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Inviting her to reflect on the contrast between her past confidence and current helplessness.
text: Jab aap un purane dino ko yaad karti hain jahan aap poore confidence se lead karti thi, aur uski tulna aaj ke is dar se karti hain, toh aapke andar kaisa mehsus hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach pucho toh khud par bahut gussa aata hai. Main sochti hoon ki maine kyun shuruat mein hi itna compromise hone diya. Par phir realise karti hoon ki agar compromise na karti, toh roz kalesh hote aur mera husband bhi tang aa jata.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her core conflict between personal frustration and relational preservation.
text: Aap ek aisi uljhan mein phans gayi hain jahan ek taraf apni hi past ki chuppi par narazgi hai, aur dusri taraf husband aur rishton ko bachane ki wo purani majboori dikhti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Agar main tab apne baare mein soch kar khadi hoti, to shadi tootne ki naubat bhi aa sakti thi. Aur waisa hua toh meri maa ka dil toot jata, unhone akele mujhe bahut struggle se bada kiya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her core fear of disappointing her mother if her marriage faces strain.
text: Aapne apni maa ko us naye kalesh ki takleef se bachane ke liye khud ke sapno ko side mein rakh diya, taki unki saari mehnat aur parvarish kisi shaq ke ghere mein na aaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main apni maa ke sacrifices ko waste nahi karna chahti thi. Par kya meri aisi soch galat hai? Ek hadd tak lagta hai ki maa ke khushi ke chakkar mein maine completely khud ko barbaad kar liya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Holding space for the persistent duration of her identity search.
text: Itne arse se aap apni identity aur beti hone ke farz ke beech jawab dhundh rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Par ab mujhe rote nahi rehna hai. Jo in-house project wala kadam aapne bataya, wo mujhe sach mein ek realistic ray of hope laga. Kam se kam office time mein to mera dimaag theek se focus kar payega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her duty-bound approach transitioning into a renewed sense of empowerment at work.
text: Apne office ke waqt ko fir se apne control mein rakhne ki himmat se aapke andar is naye role ko jeene ki taqat aane lagi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul! Aur honestly, agar office mein main thodi mentally engaged rahungi nayi cheezon mein, toh shaam ko ghar par jo roz ka routine hai wo aur zyada calmly handle kar paungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring how finding professional space can directly support her relational peace at home.
text: Jab kaam par aapki ambition ko ek safe jagah mil jayegi, toh ghar walo ke sath aapke rishte mein natural tareeke se aur shanti aa jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni suppressed ambition ko smile ke peeche chhupa kar sabki seva karti rehti hoon
text: Haan, ab mujhe clear dikh raha hai ki pure takraav ki zaroorat nahi hai. Apni suppressed ambition ko smile ke peeche chhupa kar sabki seva karti rehti hoon, bas is routine ko thoda tweak karna hai apne fayde ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her realization that a gradual approach prevents the feared outcome of family shock.
text: Is dhire-dhire nikalne wale raste se aap family ke kisi achanak reaction ya dar ko face kiye bina apne liye aage badhne ki space bana payengi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Kal main office jaate hi sabse pehle ye 1-on-1 meeting fix karti hoon. Thodi nervous zaroor hoon is nayi shuruat ke liye, par dimaag kafi fresh feel kar raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing that lasting changes in family dynamics start with small strategic steps.
text: Jab aap kal ye kadam uthayengi, toh dhyan rakhiyega ki aksar bade aur lamba chalne wale badlaav bina kisi kalesh ke aise hi chhote strategic step se start hote hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you so much. Aaj sach mein kisine lamba time lekar meri situation ko bina judge kiye samjha hai. Kal manager se milne ke baad zarur thoda aur confidence aayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the significant time and effort she took today to prepare for tomorrow's action.
text: Aaj is ahem baatcheet ke baad aur apna itna waqt nikal kar saari chizen sochne se, lagta hai aap aane wale kal ke chote kadam ke liye mentally theek se tayar ho chuki hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni khwahishon ka gala har din ghot-ti hai
text: Doctor ko lagta hai ki main overworked hoon, par asli dard toh apni pehchaan khone ka hai taaki rishta bacha rahe. Sasural wale kehte hain ki aurat ka asli gehna uska ghar hai, isliye main office ki problems kabhi share nahi karti taaki koi kalesh na ho. Unka sar uncha rahe, bas isiliye main ek silent performer bani hoon jo apni khwahishon ka gala har din ghot-ti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the relational obligation of preserving family peace by suppressing her own identity using Lens C.
text: Rishte ko bachane ki is koshish mein, tumhe lag raha hai ki tum apni identity ko poori tarah se daba rahi ho taaki ghar ka mahaul theek rahe...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Exactly. Office mein targets meet karne ke baad jab WFH khatam karke room se nikalti hoon, toh doosri shift shuru hoti hai. Ek dum perfect bahu banne ki. Thakan se bura haal hota hai par bina kalesh ke muskura kar chai banani padti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To reflect the crushing dual duty she performs daily using Lens B.
text: Office aur sasural ki in double duties ko lagataar nibhate hue, tumhara apna sukoon kahin poori tarah peechhe chhoot gaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Kisi ko farq nahi padta meri feelings se. Agar ek din bol doon ki main thak gayi hoon, toh turant taane aayenge ki 'achhi bahu' toh bina complain kiye sab sambhalti hai. Log kya kahenge ki kitni selfish hai jo apne baare mein soch rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To acknowledge the stigma fear quietly and validate the duration of her endurance using Lens D.
text: Is 'achhi bahu' ke tag ko banaye rakhne ke liye tum barso se chupchap yeh bojh seh rahi ho...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni khwahishon ka gala har din ghot-ti hai
text: Aur koi option bhi toh nahi hai. Apne parents ko stress nahi dena chahti. Toh bas ek natak chal raha hai jahan main bas wahi aurat ban gayi hoon jo apni khwahishon ka gala har din ghot-ti hai. Meri khud ki koi pasand hi nahi bachi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the feared consequence of asserting herself and causing stress to her parents using Lens E.
text: Agar tumne apni thakan ke baare mein sach kaha, toh tumhe darr lagta hai ki kalesh mayke tak pahunch jayega aur unhe pareshan karega...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Haan, aur mayke wale pehle hi mere bhai ki padhai aur loans ko leke pareshan hain. Office aur ghar dono mein bas mar mar ke chal rahi hoon... kabhi kabhi lagta hai bas sab chhod kar kahin gayab ho jaun, saans lene ki jagah hi nahi bachi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To safely hold the moderate risk by mirroring her role overload using Lens B and asking a direct safety question.
text: Yeh sab akele bardaasht karte hue tumhe aisi ghutan mehsoos ho rahi hai jahan tumhara wajood hi khatam ho raha hai... Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni khwahishon ka gala har din ghot-ti hai
text: Haan main theek hoon, aisi koi bewakoofi nahi karungi. Bas ek lachari hai jahan main wahi silent performer bani hoon jo apni khwahishon ka gala har din ghot-ti hai. Bas chahti hoon thodi shanti mile.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To name the unexpressed feeling of isolation stemming from her relational preservation and identity conflict.
text: Lagta hai ki is silent performer ka role nibhate nibhate aur sabke expectations poore karte hue tum ek gehre akelepan aur isolation mein phas gayi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Isolation hi toh hai. Office mein colleagues sochte hain main kaafi sorted hoon, ghar mein saas-sasur ko bas meri salary aur time se khana chahiye. Mera khud ka koi wajood hi nahi bacha hai. Main bas ek robot ban ke reh gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To normalize her exhaustion as a common outcome for working women in traditional households, separating her worth from their judgment.
text: Ek working aurat ke liye humari society mein, office aur ghar ko bina shikayat chalane ka yeh expectations ka bojh itna normalize kar diya gaya hai, aur aisi situation mein akele mehsus karna bilkul swabhavik hai, iska yeh matlab nahi ki tumhari effort mein koi kami hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Lekin kab tak main ye sab sahungi? Kabhi kabhi itni exhausted feel karti hoon ki laptop ke aage hi rone lagti hoon, camera off karke. Meeting chal rahi hoti hai aur mere aansu rukte nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To validate her struggle systemically by disclosing a common pattern among working daughters-in-law.
text: Working bahus mein apni jarurato ko poori tarah ignore karna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki adarsh bahu ki image maintain karna sabse zaroori maana jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Image maintain karna hi sabse bada kalesh ban gaya hai zindagi ka. Main itni thak chuki hoon is jhooth se. Mujhe sach mein samajh nahi aa raha aage ka... ab kya karoon ki kam se kam din mein saans lene ka thoda waqt mile?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To offer two small, low-friction suggestions that fit seamlessly into her dual duties without raising suspicion.
text: Jab aadarsh aurat ka tag aur office ki duty itni heavy ho, toh do chhote steps try kar sakti ho. Ek, office logout aur room se bahar aane ke beech 5 minute sirf aankhein band karke baithna. Ya doosra, lunch break mein 5 minute apni pasand ka koi relaxing gaana sunna headphones pe. Isme se konsa aasan lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Lunch break mein gaana sunna theek lag raha hai. WFH wale din lunch break mein 5 min room ka darwaza lock karke headphones laga sakti hoon. Isse kisi ko shak bhi nahi hoga aur kalesh bhi nahi machega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To break down the chosen suggestion into simple, manageable steps for her to visualize.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki kal jab lunch break ho, toh apne room mein door lock karke baitho aur ek pasandida gaana lagao… phir deep breath lekar apne aage ka kaam shuru karo… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Ye main definitely try kar sakti hoon. Actually ye soch kar hi thodi relaxation mil rahi hai ki din ke wo 5 min sirf mere honge. Mujhe us waqt office emails ya raat ke dinner ka menu plan nahi karna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To reframe her exhaustion systemically, reducing her self-blame regarding managing two full-time jobs.
text: Working bahu se yeh ummeed rakhna ki wo do full-time jobs - ek office aur ek sasural - bina thake kare, yeh ek structural dabav hai. Yeh expectation society ka banaya hua hai, isme tumhara koi kasoor ya failure nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Maine khud ko itna blame kiya ki main properly manage nahi kar paa rahi. Mujhe lagta tha ki meri kshamta hi kam hai agar meeting ke baad ghar ke kaam mein 19-20 ho jaye. Ab burden thoda kam lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror her relief upon shifting the blame from herself to the unrealistic systemic expectations using Lens D.
text: Pichle kuch waqt se jis perfection ke bojh ko tum apna kasoor samajh kar dhho rahi thi, usko ab ek unreal standard ki tarah dekhna tumhe thodi rahat de raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Haan bilkul. Waise main aaj bhi thaki hui hoon. Pata hai abhi bhi kal ka presentation mere dimaag mein chal raha hai aur sasur ji ki dawai ka time bhi. Par pehli baar main khud ko kos nahi rahi hoon in sab ke beech.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To affirm her strength in holding both responsibilities without harsh self-judgment.
text: Khud ke sapno ko is double duty ke beech zinda rakhne ki koshish karna aur ab is thakan ke liye apne aap ko blame na karna, tumhari ek bohot badi strength hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Strength toh chahiye hi hogi. Agar main zara bhi kamzor padhi toh unhe mauka mil jayega kehne ka ki dekho job karna iske bas ka nahi hai, isko job chhod deni chahiye. Main wo 'aurat ka asli gehna ghar hai' wali taane dobara nahi sunna chahti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the feared consequence of her job being taken away if she shows vulnerability using Lens E.
text: Jab sasural mein tumhara ghar aakar thak jana question hota hai, toh yeh darr lagta hai ki tumhari bachi-kuchi pehchaan, tumhara career bhi tumse chheen liya jayega...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Exactly! Mere liye office sirf ek salary check nahi, mera aatm-samman hai. Agar wo career chheen gaya, toh main us traditional sasural mein suffocate hoke reh jaungi. Isliye main wahan ki stress ghar mein batati hi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To explore how she protects and celebrates her self-esteem currently, given she has to hide it.
text: Is ghutan aur kalesh ke darr ke beech, jab tumhara aatm-samman aur office identity maintain karna itna zaroori hai, toh tum apne office ki achievements ko akele mein kaise acknowledge karti ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Acknowledge kahan karti hoon. Jab koi client appreciate karta hai, toh bas smile karke agli slide pe chali jati hoon kyunki dimaag mein raat ka khana chal raha hota hai. Par shayad apne un 5 min ke break mein uspe thoda focus kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To reflect her growing sense of hope and self-worth as she plans to acknowledge her own achievements.
text: Lagta hai ki system ke pressure ki wajah se jo achievements andekhi reh gayi thi, unhe ab khud ke liye thoda mehsus karne ka khayal tumhe ek nayi azaadi de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Haan, bilkul. Kam se kam main janti hoon main kabil hoon. Mere manager jante hain meri value. Agar sasural mein mujhe sirf ghar ki bahu ke frame mein rakha ja raha hai, toh main use define nahi hone doongi khud ko andar se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To normalize the societal tendency to underplay women's financial independence and validate her mental protection.
text: Society mein aksar financial independence aur office identity ko aurat ke ghar ke role ke neeche rakha jata hai, aur is baat ka pata hona tumhe mental level par apne aap ko protect karne mein madad kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Aap bilkul sahi keh rahe hain. Ye structural issue hai, meri kami nahi. Main poori society toh ek din mein nahi badal sakti, par apne liye ek mental space definitely create kar sakti hoon jahan main khud ki value feel karun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror her commitment to balancing family peace with internal self-preservation using Lens C.
text: Aane wale samay mein bina kisi kalesh ke, tum rishton ke beech dimaag aur dil mein apne wajood aur sukoon ka ek chhota sa hissa surakshit rakhna chahti ho...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Wahi ek tareeka hai is waqt balance banane ka. Main nahi chahti mera parivaar tute ya stress ho, par main khud ko bhi mitne nahi doongi puri tarah. Those 5 minutes of my time will remind me of my identity.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To praise her resolve in finding small but meaningful ways to preserve her identity amidst rigid expectations.
text: Apne office ke targets aur sasural ke strict protocols ke beech bhi, apne wajood ko itni samajhdaari se ahmiyat dena ek bohot hi taqatvar aur positive step hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Thank you sunne ke liye. Mujhe lag raha tha ki main hi galat hoon jo itna complain kar rahi hoon apne dimaag mein. Pata chala ki aisi situation mein thakna aur pehchaan ka crisis hona kaafi common aur normal hai. Ab mujhe pehle se kaafi halka mehsus ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To close by validating her strength in recognizing her needs and taking a step towards her well-being.
text: Is mushkil safar mein apni jaruraton ko bina judge kiye pehchaan-na aur aage badhne ke liye apne hak ka waqt nikalna waqayi himmat ki baat hai, aur tum apne liye yeh choti si jeet bakhubi haasil kar rahi ho.
